name: Tomatoes Apizza
teaser: Legit great thin-crust New Haven-style from a coal oven in the suburbs of Detroit. Incredible.
review: I can't believe you can get legit great thin-crust New Haven-style from a coal oven in the suburbs of Detroit, but it's true, kids. They even do a Pizza Hut-style buffet for lunch (but still just do full pies).
headsUp: New Haven-style from a coal oven in suburban Detroit. Surreal and excellent.
update: One of the most surprising pizzerias in the country.
